editionData.title: Daily Brief for May 26, 2026: U.S. renews strikes on Iran, citing threats posed to American troops; As new Iran deal faces sharp criticism, Trump...
editionData.description: Global headlines: U.S. renews strikes on Iran, citing threats posed to American troops (The new U.S. military action threatens to complicate a shaky ceasefire and ongoing negotiations to end a months-long war); As new Iran deal faces sharp criticism, Trump seeks to widen Abraham Accords (GOP lawmakers warned against concessions to Iran in any deal to end the war, while doubts greeted Trump’s push to expand pacts between Israel and Muslim-majority nations); and Russia’s overnight barrage on Ukraine includes use of powerful Oreshnik missile (At least two people died in Kyiv, which faced the brunt of the attack, Ukrainian officials said. It was one of the biggest overnight aerial assaults since the beginning of Russia's invasion). Markets leaned higher, with 5 of 7 tracked indexes up; S&P BSE SENSEX up 1.42% was the largest move. Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes. Hacker News: Using AI to write better code more slowly (A lot of people seem convinced that the point of AI coding is to write low-quality code as fast as possible. Spew out barely-passable...); Taking a walk may lead to more creativity than sitting, study finds (2014) (“We wanted to see if a simple walk might lead to more free-flowing thoughts and more creativity.”); and Norway's 2 petabytes of Huawei flash storage and LLM training (Norway’s National Library is developing a large language model (LLM) that understands the Norwegian ...). Product Hunt features Supaboard 3.0 (AI data analysts that understand your business), Yansu (AI that learns how you work and turns it into software), and own.page (Make your own personal website with bento tiles).
editionData.author: Sony Mathew

headlines.title: U.S. renews strikes on Iran, citing threats posed to American troops
headlines.summary: The new U.S. military action threatens to complicate a shaky ceasefire and ongoing negotiations to end a months-long war.

headlines.title: As new Iran deal faces sharp criticism, Trump seeks to widen Abraham Accords
headlines.summary: GOP lawmakers warned against concessions to Iran in any deal to end the war, while doubts greeted Trump’s push to expand pacts between Israel and Muslim-majority nations.

headlines.title: Russia’s overnight barrage on Ukraine includes use of powerful Oreshnik missile
headlines.summary: At least two people died in Kyiv, which faced the brunt of the attack, Ukrainian officials said. It was one of the biggest overnight aerial assaults since the beginning of Russia's invasion.

headlines.title: Africa is Catholicism’s future, but Pentecostal churches are growing faster
headlines.summary: The growth of Christianity in Africa has turned the continent into a denominational battleground. Pope Leo’s visit to Angola came as his church confronts a rising challenge.

headlines.title: Trump’s unofficial Venezuela viceroy shapes U.S. policy, raising oversight concerns
headlines.summary: Mauricio Claver-Carone doesn’t work for the U.S. government but has an outsize role in determining the future of Venezuela.

headlines.title: Cost of living crisis reshapes Eid spending in Nigeria
headlines.summary: High costs in Nigeria are reshaping Eid preparations as families adjust spending and cut back on celebrations.

headlines.title: US military launches strikes on southern Iran amid talks in Qatar
headlines.summary: US Central Command announces 'self-defence' strikes as Tehran's top negotiators gather in Qatar for talks.

headlines.title: Canada’s Mark Carney calls treatment of Gaza flotilla activists ‘appalling’
headlines.summary: The prime minister called for an independent investigation into Israeli mistreatment, but stopped short of penalties.

headlines.title: US forces strike southern Iran as top Tehran officials in Qatar for talks
headlines.summary: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian has ordered the restoration of internet services after months of blocked access.

headlines.title: Trump renews petition for White House ballroom, pointing to nearby shooting
headlines.summary: The Trump administration has sought nearly $1bn in taxpayer funds to complete the ballroom project, citing security.

headlines.title: Ahead of the World Cup, pressure to win and grow American soccer is on Tim Ream's mind
headlines.summary: Hoping to make the roster for the U.S. Men's National team going to the World Cup, Tim Ream knows there's a lot riding on the tournament, from playing well to growing a new generation of fans at home.

headlines.title: After Stephen Colbert's viral talk show parody, CBS backs down from copyright action
headlines.summary: CBS and Paramount backed away from copyright challenges to limit distribution of Stephen Colbert's appearance on a Michigan cable access show. He ended his run as host of "The Late Show" on Friday.

headlines.title: Trump to get 'routine annual' medical exam 7 months after last visit to Walter Reed
headlines.summary: White House boasts Trump's "excellent health" as questions loom over the medical reality of the oldest inaugurated president.

headlines.title: Trump says U.S. and Iran nearing a peace deal. And, Pope Leo weighs in on AI's rise
headlines.summary: President Trump says that a deal with Iran to end the war is largely negotiated. And, Pope Leo XIV weighed in today on the rise of AI during his first encyclical.

headlines.title: U.S. military strikes Iran as Trump says negotiations move forward for deal to end war
headlines.summary: The U.S. military announced strikes against Iranian positions just hours after President Trump says more countries should normalize ties with Israel in any Iran deal, tempering expectations of peace.

headlines.title: Xi hails Sino-Serbian bond
headlines.summary: President Xi Jinping called on China and Serbia to strengthen the alignment of development strategies, expand cooperation in emerging sectors, enhance youth and people-to-people exchanges, and step up coordination in international affairs, as he held talks with visiting Serbian President Aleksandar Vucic in Beijing.

headlines.title: Closer China-Pakistan ties urged for better outcomes
Abuse in French schools points to 'a systemic risk'
headlines.summary: France's state-run nursery and primary school sector is in the spotlight after a major investigation was launched into allegations of violence and abuse, both physical and sexual, at more than 100 institutions nationwide.

headlines.title: Trump approves emergency declaration over California chemical leak
headlines.summary: Federal, state and local authorities in the United States continued emergency response operations Monday after a chemical incident at an aerospace facility in Garden Grove, Southern California, prompted the evacuation of nearly 50,000 residents across multiple communities in Orange County. Officials said the immediate threat of a catastrophic explosion had been eliminated, although evacuation orders remained in effect in affected areas.

headlines.title: Tea, opera and friendship brew cultural connections in Los Angeles
headlines.summary: For Ghaffar Pourazar, the legendary Monkey King from the Chinese classic Journey to the West is more than a stage character — it is a reflection of his own life journey.

headlines.title: Amit Shah to visit border areas over next three weeks
headlines.summary: Amit Shah to assess border security in Rajasthan and Gujarat, focusing on Pakistan and Bangladesh borders over three weeks.

headlines.title: India-China issues, impact of global conflicts, and the role of middle powers in spotlight at Huddle 2026
headlines.summary: Join global diplomats and experts at Huddle 2026 in Bengaluru to explore India-China relations and middle power diplomacy.

headlines.title: 87% winners in Assam polls got votes above 50%, shows ADR study
headlines.summary: A study reveals 87% of Assam poll winners secured over 50% of the votes, highlighting trends in electoral success and criminal backgrounds.

headlines.title: BJP hits out at Rahul Gandhi over fuel price comments amid global tensions
headlines.summary: BJP defends fuel price decisions, criticizing Rahul Gandhi's comments amid global tensions, emphasizing public interest and economic stability.

headlines.title: Quad Foreign Ministers meet LIVE: Amid West Asia turmoil, Quad Foreign Ministers gather to reinforce Indo-Pacific stability
headlines.summary: Follow live updates from The Hindu as Quad Foreign Ministers from the United States, Australia and Japan hold a crucial meeting in New Delhi on May 26, 2026

headlines.title: Oil rises, stocks mixed as new US strikes dampen peace deal optimism
headlines.summary: Oil prices rose on Tuesday and stocks were mixed ​as investor optimism over an imminent U.S.-Iran peace deal was tempered by new U.S. strikes in the Middle ‌East.

headlines.title: Explosions heard in Iran, Mehr says Bandar Abbas situation under control
headlines.summary: Reuters: Explosions heard in Iran, Mehr says Bandar Abbas situation under control.

headlines.title: US forces conducted 'self-defense strikes' in southern Iran, Fox News says
headlines.summary: U.S. ​forces ‌conducted "self-defense strikes" ​in ​southern ⁠Iran ​on ​Monday, Fox ​News ​reported, citing a ‌military ⁠spokesperson.

headlines.title: Lavrov tells Rubio of Russian decision to strike Kyiv sites linked to military
headlines.summary: Russian Foreign Minister Sergei Lavrov advised U.S. Secretary ​of State Marco Rubio ‌on Monday of Moscow's decision to launch strikes on sites ​in Kyiv linked ​to the Ukrainian military, the ⁠Russian Foreign Ministry said.

headlines.title: Iran's president orders reopening of international internet access, state media reports
headlines.summary: Iran's President Masoud Pezeshkian ​has issued an order to reopen international internet ‌access, Iranian state media reported on Monday, citing an official after a near-90-day blackout in the wake of the ​war against U.S. and Israel.

hackerNews.summary: A visual explanation of how threshold secret sharing lets any k of n shares recover a secret.

hackerNews.title: California moves to exempt Linux from its age-verification law after backlash
Designing for and against the manufactured normalcy field (2012)
hackerNews.summary: This post tells the story of the session at FOO camp this year that I co-ran with Matt Webb on the Manufactured Normalcy Field. It explains the background of the idea, describes the structure of the brainstorming session, outlines its results, and then tracks some of the uptake of the idea since FOO, specifically in a recent episode of A Show with Ze Frank .
